pending.text: You're broke because you're waiting for permission. Your parents think it's sketch. Your friends think you're crazy. How many calls this month did you miss because you were already on a job? Not answering is costing you more than you think. Send this to a contractor still losing work to voicemail.

Better question. How many of those people just call your competitor instead.

That's not a bad day. That's a pattern that costs you.

We built systems that do exactly that. Costs less than one lost job.

#MakeMoneyFast #TeenJobs #PressureWashing #SummerMoney #WorkFromHome

So my friend asked me last week why I wasn't just working at McDonald's for minimum wage. I told him I was doing junk removal instead and making $450 to $750 a week. He went quiet. Then he asked how I set it up. The thing is, I didn't build the website. I didn't figure out the booking system. I didn't handle the phone calls at first. BOSS Systems built all that. I just showed up and did the work. Kept 80 percent of what came in. Sounds like one of those scams your parents warn you about, but ...

Here's what your phone is actually doing right now: ringing to nobody. Seven out of ten calls from customers go straight to voicemail. They call your competitor instead. That's the gap we close.
